pi_items.source: Verified through task_utils.sh, verifier.py, and Floreant POS documentation which confirms virtual printer configuration support. 'Bar Printer' is a valid custom printer name that can be created through Back Office configuration.

Verified through verifier.py (line 119), setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and web search confirming that 'Beverages' is a standard menu category in Floreant POS. Per Floreant documentation: 'beverage category will skip Kitchen Printer.'

Verified through task_utils.sh (line 8: FLOREANT_PIN='1111') and web search of Floreant POS configuration documentation confirming that 1111 is the default PIN for Back Office access. Task description and comments in task_utils.sh confirm this PIN is used to access Back Office.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b using a clean database snapshot. The metadata specifies creating a virtual printer named 'Bar Printer' (a valid custom name supported by Floreant's virtual printer configuration feature) and configuring the 'Beverages' menu category (a standard category in Floreant POS that has special handling to skip Kitchen Printer) to route to this printer. The Back Office PIN is 1111, which is the confirmed default PIN for Floreant POS Back Office access. The task verifies these changes through Derby database queries checking the VIRTUAL_PRINTER and MENU_CATEGORY tables.
